calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.
Grant. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Continued To Dec-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Kalos Support Services, LLC, a Mississippi limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:57 a.m.

David J. Cook, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation.
Kent Alleyne, Senior Credit and Collections Manager, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Cook & Alleyne appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Kalos Support Services, LLC, a Mississippi limited liability company.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book Account, Account Stated & Quantum Meriut was filed on January 26, 2021, and personally served on defendant Kalos Support Services, LLC's Registered Agent of Process on February 4, 2021.
Default was entered on July 9, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 9, 2021.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Invoices...................................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Kalos Support Services, LLC, a Mississippi limited liability company, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $74,304.43.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,365.60.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $85,120.03.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:10 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2021 Continued To Oct-13-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
